highlights.text: I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the momentum.
One of the most powerful building blocks is elevator down sell into Failed Breakdown, into short squeeze.
Elevator down sell refers to a short period of time where ES flushes every support violently.
ES went elevator down to 6484 by 3am.
I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “This is where I get interested, and an obvious trade is the Failed Breakdown of today’s 6524 daily low.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow

Once broken, next leg sees 6703, 6716, 6761-65.” Overnight and this morning, we trapped below 6623, recovered, and ripped up the range to 6647 before spending most the day chopping around 6623 with a magnet, expanding this range futher.

post_title: After Yesterdays Squeeze, SPX Is Consolidating. Trend Move Coming. What Way? March 25 Plan
